'''[https://www.gamesewar.com/ EWar Games]''' along with '''[https://www.instagram.com/upthrust_esports/ Upthrust Esports]''' present the second season of the BGMI tournament called the  '''BGMI EWar Mahayudh Season 2''' with a total prize pool of ₹1,50,000 {{Abbr/INR}}.
